title: lussacia hispida
intro: Lussacia hispida, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its hairy leaves and pink, purple, or white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Lussacia hispida include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of IBS, menstrual cramps, and other gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Wood Betony include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
